name: Tennis Life
short_description: Physics multiplayer with player growth, manager mode and club building
detailed_description:
Tennis Life is a highly realistic tennis game built around real-time PvP competition.

The game features a fully physics-based simulation system. Ball behavior is determined by players’ body movement, acceleration, and realistic force transfer through the racket — not simple aiming or stat-based calculations. Every swing, footwork decision, and positioning choice directly affects ball speed, trajectory, and placement.

Real-Time PvP Where Skill and Tactics Decide Everything

  • Fully real-time online matches with no turn-based or automated resolution

  • Cross-platform online play across Windows, macOS, iOS, and Android

  • Match outcomes are determined by player skill, positioning, and tactical decisions — not raw stats

The Only Real-Time Online 2v2 Doubles Tennis Experience

Tennis Life is currently the only tennis game on the market that supports real-time online 2v2 doubles matches.
Players must coordinate positioning, rotations, offense, and defense with their partner, delivering an authentic doubles tennis experience with real tactical depth.

Player-Driven Character Development

  • Freely choose how your player develops their technical strengths

  • Fully customizable skill trees and physical training paths

  • Development choices are reflected precisely in real-time matches, shaping your player’s playstyle and tactical strengths

Every player grows into a distinct competitor with a unique style.

Manager and Club Gameplay

Beyond the court, players can act as professional managers running a tennis club:

  • Construct functional facilities for training and operations

  • Recruit players and coaches (played by real users)

  • Form long-term communities centered around clubs

  • Earn prize money through competitive matches as the club’s primary income

In the future, clubs will be able to host their own tournaments, further expanding the professional tennis ecosystem.

A Real-Time, Physics-Driven Tennis World

Tennis Life is not a power-based or auto-resolved tennis game.
Every match is played live, governed by physics, and decided by player skill and strategy.

supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Traditional Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America
